theme: Design a multilayer coating to hit a reflectance spectrum
title: Thin-Film Coating: Hit a Reflectance Spectrum
strategies: trivial: deposit zero layers (bare substrate) -> reproduces the checker baseline
greedy: repeatedly add a quarter-wave layer that nulls the single worst wavelength, treating wavelengths independently (ignores inter-wavelength coupling; plateaus on banded targets)

strong: reason in optical-admittance space -- alternating high/low quarter-wave layers move admittance multiplicatively (additively in log-admittance) and build a reflectance band; enumerate that structural family over all material pairs/period counts, refine thicknesses by deterministic coordinate descent against the full band, keep the smallest penalized objective
